aiTexts: The Kit Kat 4 Finger Chocolate Box is a delightful treat for chocolate lovers of all ages.
This multipack contains 24 individually wrapped 35g bars, making it perfect for sharing or enjoying on the go.
Crafted by Nestle, these milk chocolate bars are not only delicious but also meet halal dietary requirements.
Ideal for parties, picnics, or as a sweet snack at home, they offer a satisfying crunch with every bite.
Indulge in the classic taste of Kit Kat and elevate your snacking experience!

1299448762.title: Kinder Happy Hippo Chocolate Wafers T5

review_count.reviewContent: My son loves these chocolates and also thank you for the free delivery too.
Kinder happy hippo cocoa t5 wafers, ....free gift... delicious snacks
Kids love the fun hippo shape, Great for a quick snack, The cocoa sprinkles add a nice touch,

1299448762.detail_text: Highlights Kinder Happy Hippo is a delightful snack, with its hippo-shaped biscuit shell that's both fun and appealing to kids and adults alike. The treat features a crispy wafer exterior filled with two creamy layers—typically a rich milk cream and smooth hazelnut or cocoa cream, depending on the variety. Each bite offers a satisfying contrast between the crunchy outer shell and the soft, sweet filling inside. Individually wrapped for freshness and convenience, Kinder Happy Hippo is part of the larger Kinder brand, which is renowned for combining high-quality ingredients with playful, imaginative packaging. It’s a popular treat across Europe and other regions, often enjoyed as a small indulgence or given as a gift. Ingredients Sugar, Vegetable Fats (Palm, Shea) Wheat Flour, Milk Powder, Fat-Reduced Cocoa Powder, Skimmed Milk Powder, Hazelnuts, Whey Powder, Dark Chocolate (Sugar, Cocoa, Mass, Cocoa Butter, Emulsifier: Lecithin (Soy), Flavouring: Vanillin), Wheat Starch, Emulsifier: Lecithin (Soy), Vegetable Oil (Sunflower), Whey Protein Concentrate, Raising Agents: Ammonium Bicarbonate, Sodium Bicarbonate, Salt, Flavourings: Vanillin. Total Milk Constituents 12%. Total Cocoa Solids: 5% ALLERGEN INFORMATION: Contains WHEAT, MILK, HAZELNUTS, SOY. Contains Emulsifier And Raising Agents As Permitted Food Conditioners And Permitted Flavouring Substances.
1299448762.detail_html:
Highlights

Kinder Happy Hippo is a delightful snack, with its hippo-shaped biscuit shell that's both fun and appealing to kids and adults alike. The treat features a crispy wafer exterior filled with two creamy layers—typically a rich milk cream and smooth hazelnut or cocoa cream, depending on the variety. Each bite offers a satisfying contrast between the crunchy outer shell and the soft, sweet filling inside. Individually wrapped for freshness and convenience, Kinder Happy Hippo is part of the larger Kinder brand, which is renowned for combining high-quality ingredients with playful, imaginative packaging. It’s a popular treat across Europe and other regions, often enjoyed as a small indulgence or given as a gift.
